option.value: of a conversion of|Phantom trait for marking the semantic target of a conversion of a
of a conversion of|Phantom trait for marking the semantic target of a conversion of a domain model entity to a text element representation
of a way of|Conceive of a way of making
of other parts of|This ensures that those ids will not overlap with ids of other parts of the flow.
of the leaf state of|It must be recognizable if one render content item is fully writable, i.e., a representation of the leaf state of the content tree.
of the pattern section of|State of one row of the pattern section of a player's board.
on|supplies the full set of monadic operations.
